name: Fiona Gallagher
description: Fiona Gallagher is a fictional character from the American television series "Shameless." The show, created by Paul Abbott, first premiered in 2011 and is a remake of a British series of the same name. Fiona Gallagher, portrayed by actress Emmy Rossum, is one of the central characters and the eldest sibling in the Gallagher family.
creator: FirmHand
